name: Pan-Roasted Grouper with Leeks, Corn and Must
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh thyme or 2 teaspoons dried thyme
8 fillets of 6-ounce grouper or orange roughy
2/3 cup sliced leek (white and pale green parts only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix the first three ingredients in a small bowl.
3. Sprinkle the mixture over fish.
4. Divide oil between 2 heavy large ovenproof skillets.
5. Heat skillets until hot.
6. Add 4 fish fillets to each skillet and cook until bottoms are brown, about 3 minutes.
7. Transfer fish to a large platter.
8. Divide leek, corn, and wine between the same skillets and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits.
9. Place 4 fish fillets, browned side down, atop vegetables in each skillet.
10. Bake until fish is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
11. Transfer fish to plates.
12. Combine all vegetables and liquid in one skillet.
13. Add lime juice to vegetables.
14. Add butter and whisk over low heat until melted.
15. Season with salt and pepper.
16. Spoon vegetables with sauce alongside fish and serve.
